mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist (member_id, spotify_playlist_id, name, prompt) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{spotifyPlaylistId}, #{name}, #{prompt})
INSERT INTO song (spotify_track_id, spotify_track_uri, title, artist, album) VALUES (#{spotifyTrackId}, #{spotifyTrackUri}, #{title}, #{artist}, #{album}) ON CONFLICT (spotify_track_id) DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO playlist_song (playlist_id, song_id, position) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{songId}, #{position})
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, spotify_playlist_id, name, prompt, created_at FROM playlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT s.id, s.spotify_track_id, s.spotify_track_uri, s.title, s.artist, s.album FROM song s INNER JOIN playlist_song ps ON s.id = ps.song_id WHERE ps.playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY ps.position ASC
